name: TCL AC
description: The TCL 1 Ton T3-Pro delivers dependable cooling even in extreme heat thanks to its rugged T3 compressor. Wi-Fi smart control, gold-fin anti-corrosion coating, and auto self-cleaning make it a low-maintenance choice for bedrooms and small living spaces.
features: T3 compressor rated for up to 50°C ambient

name: TCL AC
description: TCL's Elite Series 1.5 Ton split AC balances fast cooling and heating with efficient DC inverter operation. Its 7-way airflow control and full-BTU performance in high heat make it a solid mid-range pick for living rooms.
features: Full BTU output even at extreme outdoor temperatures

name: TCL AC
description: The Miracle Series 1.5 Ton inverter AC is built for rapid comfort, cooling a room to 18°C in about 30 seconds. Whisper-quiet operation and double-swing airflow give it strong all-round performance for everyday use.
features: Double swing louvers for even air distribution

name: TCL AC
description: TCL's T5-Smart line pairs full DC inverter cooling with a photosensitive light sensor that automatically adjusts display brightness at night. The Titan Gold-coated coil resists corrosion for a longer service life in humid climates.

name: TCL AC
description: The FreshIN 3.0 brings TCL's patented liftable fresh-air inlet, drawing in and purifying outdoor air rather than just recirculating stale indoor air. Paired with T-AI energy-saving logic, it's built for households that prioritize air quality alongside cooling.
features: 1.5 Ton Full DC Inverter with FreshIN fresh-air intake

name: TCL AC
description: Scaled up to 2 Tons for larger rooms and halls, the Elite Series 24HEB keeps TCL's signature fast heat/cool performance and 7-way airflow control at a more accessible price point than the flagship Pro line.
features: Full BTU output in high ambient temperatures

name: TCL AC
description: The 2 Ton T3-Pro is TCL's flagship split AC for large living rooms, combining a heavy-duty T3 compressor with gold-fin protection and full IoT smart control for reliable, connected cooling year-round.
features: Wi-Fi IoT smart control via TCL Home app
Hidden LED display, "I Feel" temperature sensing

name: TCL TV
description: An entry-level 40-inch HD LED for bedrooms and secondary rooms, the D3000 focuses on solid everyday picture quality and reliability at a budget-friendly price rather than smart TV extras.

name: TCL TV
description: The Series S 49-inch brings full HD resolution and Android-based smart features to a mid-size screen at an accessible price, ideal for bedrooms or as a secondary household TV.
features: Android/Smart TV OS with app store

name: TCL TV
description: The P8US delivers true 4K UHD resolution and HDR support at a competitive price point for its 55-inch class, making it one of TCL's better value 4K smart TVs in the Pakistani market.
features: Smart TV OS with built-in Wi-Fi and app store

name: TCL TV
description: The P725 series steps up to a sharper 4K panel with TCL's AiPQ picture engine, giving noticeably better contrast and detail than entry LED models — a strong mid-range choice for a main living-room TV.

name: TCL TV
description: The C815 brings Quantum Dot QLED color to a large 65-inch screen, with Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos support for a genuinely premium home-theater experience at a mid-premium price.
features: Dolby Vision HDR + Dolby Atmos sound
Google TV / Android TV smart platform
Full-array or edge-lit local dimming (variant dependent)

name: TCL TV
description: Scaled up to 75 inches, the C725 QLED is built for a true home-theater centerpiece, combining wide color gamut Quantum Dot panels with TCL's AiPQ processing for cinema-grade contrast and detail.

name: TCL TV
description: TCL's Mini LED lineup uses thousands of precision-dimmed LED zones to deliver near-OLED contrast and brightness, positioning this 65-inch model as a flagship-tier choice for serious home theater setups.
features: 65" Mini LED 4K panel with local dimming zones
High peak brightness for HDR content

name: TCL TV
description: TCL's absolute flagship for the Pakistani market, the X915 pairs a massive 75-inch screen with true 8K resolution and Mini LED backlighting — a statement TV for buyers who want the best TCL currently offers.
features: Google TV smart platform with far-field voice

name: Anex Deluxe Hand Blender
description: Anex's higher-power hand blender line, running a 1000W DC motor for tougher blending jobs like thick batters and ice. Detachable stainless steel blades allow for easy cleaning after use.

name: Anex Blender & Grinder 2-in-1
description: An entry-level 2-in-1 blender and grinder combo from Anex, pairing a blending jar with a dry-mill grinder cup for spices and lentils. A practical everyday kitchen workhorse at a budget-friendly price.

name: Anex Blender & Grinder
description: Part of Anex's mid-range 6000-series blender/grinder lineup, the AG-6043 offers a 300W motor in a compact glass-jar design suited for smoothies, chutneys, and masalas alike.

name: Westpoint Professional Blender & Grinder 3-in-1
description: A heavy-duty 800W copper-motor blender built for serious kitchens, combining a 1.5L blending jar, mincer, and grinder cup in one stainless-steel unit. Four-headed steel blades and multi-speed control handle everything from smoothies to spice grinding.

name: Westpoint Blender & Grinder 2-in-1
description: A fully stainless-steel 2-in-1 blender and grinder from Westpoint, powered by an 800W copper motor. Ideal for smoothies, juices, and coffee/spice grinding with easy-clean removable parts.

name: Westpoint Deluxe Blender & Grinder
description: An affordable 350W blender and grinder combo for basic household blending and grinding tasks, offering solid value in Westpoint's entry-level range.

name: Anex Deluxe Citrus Juicer
description: Anex's top citrus juicer with a stronger 160W motor and stainless steel housing, designed for squeezing oranges and lemons quickly for fresh juice every morning.
features: Double cones for different citrus sizes

name: Anex Deluxe Juicer
description: A powerful 600W juicer with a transparent pulp reservoir and removable parts for easy maintenance, built for regular fresh-juice extraction from fruits and vegetables.

name: Anex Deluxe 3-in-1 Juicer Blender Dry Mill
description: A best-selling 3-in-1 unit from Anex combining a juicer, blender, and dry mill in one 600W heavy-duty machine. The stainless steel spinner and 1000ml glass jar make it a versatile all-rounder for Pakistani kitchens.
features: 1000ml clear glass jar + glass grinder cup

name: Anex Deluxe Juicer Blender Dry Mill
description: A near-identical sibling to the AG-176GL, this 3-in-1 juicer blender dry mill delivers the same 600W performance with a slightly different jar/cup styling, giving buyers another proven option in Anex's popular juicer line.
features: Juicer, blender, and dry mill functions

name: Westpoint Deluxe Juicer
description: A 500W juicer built to handle everything from watermelon to carrots, with a stainless steel grater/filter and safety lock switch. Detachable, dishwasher-safe parts make daily juicing convenient.

name: Westpoint Juicer Blender Drymill
description: A multi-function juicer, blender, and drymill unit from Westpoint aimed at buyers wanting an all-in-one appliance for juicing, blending, and dry grinding tasks.

name: Dawlance Air Fryer
description: A dependable everyday air fryer from Dawlance, the DWAF-6321 L uses one-drop-oil technology to deliver crispy, healthier meals for small to medium families. Its removable non-stick basket and simple heat/timer dials make it effortless to use daily.

name: Dawlance Air Fryer
description: The DWAF-6322 D brings Dawlance's trusted one-drop-oil frying to a compact 5.5L pot, ideal for families wanting healthier fried snacks without the mess. Adjustable heat and a reliable timer give consistent results every time.

name: Dawlance Air Fryer
description: Built for larger households, the Dawlance DWAF-3374 B XXL air fryer offers a generous 7.6L capacity for cooking full family portions in one batch. Its energy-efficient design and one-drop-oil frying make healthy, crispy cooking simple and fast.

name: Anex Deluxe Air Fryer
description: The Anex AG-2020 delivers mouthwatering, crispy results using up to 80% less oil than traditional frying. Its powerful 1700W motor and sturdy black housing make it a popular mid-range choice across Pakistani kitchens.

name: Anex Digital Air Fryer
description: A step up in convenience, the Anex AG-2024 Digital pairs a digital touch interface with 1800W of cooking power for fast, precise air frying. Ideal for families who want app-like preset simplicity without the imported price tag.

name: National Gold Digital Air Fryer
description: The National Gold NG-786-AF23 offers digital touch convenience with 8 preset cooking menus, bringing healthy, low-oil frying to everyday Pakistani meals. Its stainless steel heating element and non-stick pot are backed by a 3-year warranty.

name: Westpoint Air Fryer
description: The Westpoint WF-5253 delivers oil-free, mess-free cooking with a 6L non-stick basket and dishwasher-safe parts. Its cool-touch housing and simple dial controls make it a reliable everyday choice for Pakistani households.
features: No oil smell, no splatter design

name: Homage Air Fryer
description: Homage's HAF-5LDB0 combines a 5L non-stick basket with digital controls for consistent, crispy results with minimal oil. A well-built, feature-rich option for families wanting a trusted local brand.

name: Haier Microwave Oven
description: A sleek 20-litre solo microwave from Haier, the HMW-20MX12 offers digital touch controls for quick, reliable reheating and cooking. Its freestanding design fits neatly into any Pakistani kitchen countertop.

name: Haier Microwave Oven
description: An affordable, no-frills 20-litre solo microwave with mechanical controls, the Haier HMW-20MBS is ideal for singles and small families who want reliable reheating and defrosting without extra complexity.

name: Haier Microwave Oven
description: The Haier HMN-32100-EGB combines microwave reheating with a built-in grill for crisping and browning, giving families more cooking versatility. Digital controls and an LED interior light make everyday use simple.

name: Haier Microwave Oven
description: A large-capacity grill microwave for bigger families, the Haier HMN-45200ESD features Intelligent Chef auto-menu cooking and Easy Clean interior for hassle-free everyday use.

name: Haier Microwave Oven
description: Haier's largest solo microwave, the 62-litre HMN-62MX80, is built for big households and heavy daily use. Digital touch controls, speed/weight defrost, and eco mode make it both powerful and efficient.

name: Dawlance Microwave Oven
description: A compact, budget-friendly 20-litre solo microwave from Dawlance, the DW-MD4 features simple mechanical dials for time and heat adjustment, perfect for everyday reheating in smaller kitchens.

name: Dawlance Microwave Oven with Grill
description: The Dawlance DW-297 GSS pairs microwave reheating with grill functionality in a sleek black finish, giving families the ability to crisp and brown food alongside routine cooking, all through an easy digital panel.

name: Dawlance Microwave Oven
description: A large 62-litre microwave built for bigger families and frequent entertaining, the Dawlance DW-162HZP offers a spacious silver-finish cavity with a digital panel for effortless daily cooking.

name: Dawlance Microwave Oven with Grill
description: The Dawlance DW-128 G combines everyday microwave cooking with grilling power in a durable black finish, giving Pakistani households a versatile appliance for both reheating and crisping dishes.

name: Homage Microwave Oven with Grill
description: Homage's 28-litre HDG-282 is ideal for family meals, combining microwave heating and grill function with a large glass turntable for uniform cooking. The 30-second quick-start feature makes daily use even faster.

name: GFC Ceiling Fan
description: GFC's Ravi Plus Inverter is a best-selling 56-inch ceiling fan built for Pakistan's power situation, running efficiently on inverter/solar backup with pure copper winding for long motor life.

name: GFC Ceiling Fan
description: A classic, no-frills 56-inch ceiling fan, the GFC Karachi Model is built with an aluminum alloy body and energy-efficient copper-wound motor, offering reliable everyday cooling at an affordable price.

name: Royal Louver Pedestal Fan
description: The Royal Louver Pedestal Fan pairs a durable all-metal louver grille with a 100% copper-wound motor, delivering strong, wide-angle airflow for bedrooms, shops and offices.

name: Royal Deluxe Pedestal Fan
description: Royal's Deluxe Pedestal Fan combines a powerful motor and strong blades with 99.99% pure copper wiring, built for both indoor and outdoor cooling in Pakistani homes and shops.

name: SK Supreme Ceiling Fan
description: The SK Supreme is a budget-friendly, reliable ceiling fan available in 48" and 56" sizes, offering solid air delivery for everyday Pakistani households at an accessible price point.
features: Cream, Cream K-78, White Silver finishes

name: SK VIP Ceiling Fan
description: SK's VIP ceiling fan is a non-inverter model built for dependable, high-speed cooling, available in 48" and 56" sizes with a choice of finishes to match any room decor.

name: SK Deluxe Standard Ceiling Fan
description: A compact 40-inch non-inverter ceiling fan, the SK Deluxe Standard is well suited to smaller rooms, offering efficient airflow with a durable copper-wound motor.

name: SK Standard Pedestal Fan
description: The SK TCP Pedestal Fan offers strong, adjustable-height airflow for bedrooms, shops and offices, combining a durable copper motor with a classic pedestal design.

name: SK TCP Fancy Pedestal Fan
description: A stylish take on SK's classic pedestal fan line, the TCP Fancy 18" offers strong airflow with an upgraded design finish, available in white and black.
features: Includes motor, blades, guard, pipe and base

name: Super Asia Room Air Cooler
description: The Super Asia ECM-4500 Plus is a reliable, everyday room air cooler for small to medium rooms, with a top-loading ice box and powerful air throw to keep spaces cool through Pakistan's summer heat.
features: Top-loading cooling box with ice packs

name: Super Asia Room Air Cooler
description: With a 60-litre tank and continuous water supply system, the Super Asia ECM-5000 Plus is built for extended, uninterrupted cooling in medium to large rooms, complete with anti-bacterial honeycomb pads.
features: 60L water tank, continuous supply float valve

name: Super Asia Room Air Cooler
description: The ECM-5500 Plus offers a spacious 60-litre tank and three-sided honeycomb evaporative pads, delivering powerful, uniform cooling for larger rooms without frequent refilling.
features: Continuous water supply with float valve

name: Super Asia Room Air Cooler
description: Featuring a powerful BLDC electronic motor rated up to 60% more energy-efficient, the ECM-4700 Plus Inverter keeps rooms cool during loadshedding while sipping less power than standard AC coolers.
features: BLDC electronic motor, up to 60% energy savings

name: Super Asia Room Air Cooler
description: Super Asia's flagship ECM-6500 Plus Inverter is built for large rooms and halls, combining a 70-litre tank with an energy-efficient inverter motor for powerful, long-lasting cooling with minimal power draw.

name: Super Asia Room Air Cooler
description: The ECM-4600 Plus DC runs directly on 12V solar or battery power, making it ideal for areas with extended loadshedding. Its 3-sided honeycomb pads and anti-bacterial tank keep cooling efficient and hygienic.

name: Canon Room Air Cooler
description: Canon's CA-6500 offers a generous 90-litre tank and an 18-inch impeller fan for strong, far-reaching airflow, making it a solid mid-to-large room cooling solution with jumbo ice bottles for extra chill.

name: Canon Room Air Cooler
description: The grey variant of Canon's CA-6500 combines a copper-motor 18-inch impeller fan with a 90-litre honeycomb-cooled tank, throwing air up to 30 feet for effective whole-room cooling.
features: Copper motor, 1400 RPM, thermal overheat protection

name: Boss Room Cooler
description: The Boss ECM-IB-6500 is a compact, efficient room cooler with medium honeycomb cooling and auto-louver movement, covering rooms up to roughly 40,000 cubic feet with just 180W of power.

name: Boss Room Cooler
description: Boss's ECM-IB-11500 Pro is built for large rooms up to 50 sq.m, featuring a massive 115-litre tank, imported honeycomb cooling pads, and multi-directional wheels for easy repositioning.

name: TCL AC
description: The TCL Air Conditioner is designed to provide powerful cooling, energy efficiency, and year-round comfort for your home or office. Its advanced inverter technology maintains a consistent temperature while reducing electricity consumption, ensuring reliable performance and lower energy costs. With fast cooling, intelligent airflow, quiet operation, and user-friendly controls, it creates a comfortable indoor environment in every season. Featuring a sleek modern design, durable construction, and advanced air filtration, the TCL Air Conditioner delivers clean, refreshing air and dependable performance every day.
features: The TCL Air Conditioner features inverter technology
delivering reliable comfort and efficient cooling throughout the year.

name: Dawlance Kettle
description: The Dawlance Kettle is designed to provide fast, safe, and convenient boiling for your everyday needs. Its powerful heating system quickly brings water to the perfect temperature, making it ideal for tea, coffee, instant soups, and other hot beverages. Equipped with automatic shut-off, boil-dry protection, and an ergonomic design, it ensures both safety and ease of use. With its durable construction, energy-efficient performance, and stylish modern appearance, the Dawlance Kettle is a practical and reliable addition to any kitchen.
features: The Dawlance Kettle features fast boiling technology
and convenient boiling for everyday use.

description: The Dawlance Kettle is designed to provide fast, safe, and convenient boiling for your everyday needs. name: Dawlance Iron
description: The Dawlance Iron is designed to make ironing faster, easier, and more efficient. It delivers consistent heat and powerful steam to remove wrinkles effortlessly while protecting your fabrics from damage. With adjustable temperature settings, a smooth non-stick soleplate, and an ergonomic design, it provides comfortable handling and excellent results on a variety of fabrics. Its durable construction, energy-efficient performance, and user-friendly features make the Dawlance Iron a reliable choice for achieving crisp, professional-looking clothes every day.
features: The Dawlance Iron features a non-stick soleplate
wrinkle-free ironing with comfort and ease.

description: The Dawlance Iron is designed to make ironing faster, easier, and more efficient. name: Dawlance Freezer
description: The Dawlance Freezer is designed to provide powerful freezing performance and long-lasting food preservation for your home or business. Its advanced cooling technology maintains a consistent temperature to keep meat, seafood, frozen foods, and other perishables fresh for extended periods. With a spacious storage capacity, energy-efficient operation, durable construction, and easy temperature control, it offers convenience and reliability for everyday use. Combining modern design with dependable performance, the Dawlance Freezer is an ideal solution for safe, efficient, and long-term food storage.
features: The Dawlance Freezer offers rapid freezing technology
thick insulation for longer cooling retention
ensuring reliable food preservation and long-lasting performance.

description: The Dawlance Oven is designed to bring convenience, versatility, and precision to your everyday cooking. It delivers consistent heat for baking, grilling, roasting, and reheating, ensuring delicious results every time. With user-friendly controls, multiple cooking functions, energy-efficient performance, and a spacious interior, it makes meal preparation simple and enjoyable. name: Dawlance Hair Straightener
description: The Dawlance Hair Straightener is designed to help you achieve smooth, sleek, and salon-quality hair with ease. Its advanced ceramic-coated plates distribute heat evenly, reducing frizz while protecting your hair from excessive heat damage. With fast heat-up technology, adjustable temperature settings, and an ergonomic design, it offers comfortable and effortless styling for all hair types. Lightweight, durable, and easy to use, the Dawlance Hair Straightener is the perfect styling companion for creating beautiful looks at home or on the go.
features: The Dawlance Hair Straightener features Ceramic Coated Plates

description: The Dawlance Automatic Washing Machine is designed to provide effortless and efficient laundry care with advanced washing technology. It delivers powerful cleaning while protecting delicate fabrics, ensuring your clothes remain fresh, clean, and well maintained after every wash. Equipped with intelligent wash programs, energy- and water-efficient operation, and easy-to-use controls, it simplifies your daily laundry routine. Using advanced rapid air circulation technology, it cooks food evenly with little to no oil, allowing you to enjoy crispy, flavorful meals with less fat. Its spacious cooking basket, adjustable temperature settings, and user-friendly controls make it perfect for preparing a variety of dishes with ease. Built with a modern design, energy-efficient performance, and easy-to-clean components, the Dawlance Air Fryer is a convenient and reliable addition to any kitchen.
features: The Dawlance Air Fryer combines Rapid Air Circulation Technology

crispy meals with less oil while ensuring convenience

description: The Dawlance Refrigerator is thoughtfully designed to provide reliable cooling and long-lasting freshness for your everyday needs. Its advanced cooling technology helps maintain the ideal temperature, preserving the taste and quality of your food while reducing energy consumption. With a spacious interior, flexible storage options, durable construction, and a sleek modern design, it offers both convenience and style. features: The Dawlance Refrigerator combines Smart Cooling Technology

offering the perfect balance of convenience
and modern style for everyday use.
